news.headline: Walker & Dunlop arranges $190M sale and $157M financing for The Hamilton, a 276-unit high rise in Edgewater, Miami.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. revealed the successful arrangement of a $190 million sale and $157 million financing for The Hamilton, a prestigious bayfront high-rise consisting of 276 units in Miami's sought-after Edgewater area. The sale was facilitated by the Walker & Dunlop South Florida Investment Sales team, headed by Still Hunter, Kaya Suarez, Leigh Gerke, Bennett Hopkins, and Luke Duffack, acting on behalf of Apartment Investment and Management Company (Aimco).

news.headline: Biden plans to meet Pope Francis for the final time during his presidency.
Stocks struggle to bounce back after Fed-driven sell-off; check out Bloomberg's The Close on 12/19/2024 for more details.
news.summary: In recent reports, it was noted that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy saw a boost with the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 5% growth, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Analysts are optimistic about the future outlook, predicting further improvements in the coming months. The government is attributing these positive trends to successful economic policies and increased consumer confidence. The GDP also showed a steady increase of 3.5% in the last quarter. This data indicates a strong recovery from the recent economic downturn and a promising path for the country's financial stability.

news.headline: Teamsters strike against Amazon in Southern California enters second day, President O'Brien to rally.
news.summary: In CITY OF INDUSTRY, California, the Teamsters strike against Amazon has entered its second day, marking it as the largest strike ever seen in American history. Teamsters General President Sean M. O'Brien is set to join the striking Amazon employees at the company's DAX5 facility. The strike, which commenced on December 19, 2024, is a significant event in labor history as a massive number of workers are participating to demand fair treatment and improved conditions. The involvement of Teamsters in this strike highlights the growing discontent among workers, emphasizing the scale of the protest. The strike occurs amidst a backdrop of increasing labor activism, reflecting a broader trend of demands for better wages and working environments in the US.

news.headline: Pollo AI by HIX.AI debuted new video-to-video feature, offering users easy style transformation.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 19, 2024, in Singapore and New York, Pollo AI, an advanced AI video generator developed by HIX.AI, introduced a groundbreaking video-to-video feature. This new feature enables users to easily convert their videos into various artistic styles. The feature offers a diverse range of styles for users to choose from, enhancing the creative possibilities for video editing.

news.headline: Dogecoin down 17% in a month, readers split on reaching 25 cents or 69 cents first. Highs post-Trump win.
news.summary: Dogecoin reached new yearly highs following Donald Trump's win in the 2024 presidential election. The cryptocurrency traded between 15-18 cents on Nov. 5, and rose post-election due to optimism for a pro-crypto White House administration. Elon Musk's appointment to head the Department of Government Efficiency also boosted Dogecoin. A Benzinga poll asks if Dogecoin will trade closer to its all-time high of $0.7376 from May 2021 or back to $0.25 last seen post-election. The question posed by Benzinga asks readers whether Dogecoin is more likely to reach 69 cents or return to lower levels.

news.headline: FuriosaAI achieves success in 2024 with Llama 3.1 performance, RNGD chip release, and leadership expansion.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on December 19, 2024, FuriosaAI, a prominent company in AI semiconductor solutions, is wrapping up the year with notable advancements. Their latest second-generation chip, named RNGD (pronounced 'Renegade'), has been gaining momentum with both technical improvements and increased customer engagement. This AI solution has garnered significant attention for its performance strides and has successfully achieved various milestones.

news.headline: Rezolve Ai's $15M registered offering includes 5M shares at $3.00 each, plus 5M warrants with $3.00 exercise price.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) announced a definitive agreement for the sale of 5,000,000 ordinary shares (or pre-funded warrants) and warrants to purchase up to 5,000,000 ordinary shares at $3.00 per share in a registered offering. The warrants can be exercised immediately at $3.00 per share and will expire after either 30 days of the share price being at or above $6.00 for five consecutive trading days or after five years from the date of issuance. The offering is set to close around December 23, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Veteran Fox News host Neil Cavuto signs off after 28 years, from 4-5 p.m. slot since 1996 network launch.
news.summary: The program "Your World with Neil Cavuto" has aired in the time slot of 4-5 p.m. for a duration of 28 years, starting from the network's inception in 1996.

news.headline: Greenridge Exploration completes flow through private placement financing and partners with marketing agency. Not for distribution in the US.
news.summary: This press release is restricted from being distributed to U.S. newswire services or for sharing in the United States.

news.headline: Nearly 600 Youth Volleyball Teams Compete at SoCal Cup's 'Winter Formal' Tournament at Mandalay Bay.
news.summary: A major boys volleyball tournament series, SoCal Cup, hosted its 'Winter Formal' event at Mandalay Bay Convention Center in Las Vegas. The tournament, the first SoCal Cup event outside Southern California, saw participation from teams across the US. Organized by AIM Sports Group, the three-day event featured around 600 boys club volleyball teams spanning different age groups, including head-to-head matchups.

news.headline: Johnson hopes for passage of stopgap vote tonight.
House voting on bill to fund temporarily and raise debt ceiling
House Short of Votes to Pass Stopgap Funding and Debt-Limit Bill
Get the scoop on 'Tomarket' Telegram game airdrop: TOMA token launching on Aptos. Stay tuned for airdrop dates and game updates.
news.summary: The TOMA token from Tomarket is being introduced on the Aptos platform. Updates reveal details about the upcoming airdrop schedule and future plans for the Telegram game. Stay tuned for more information.

news.headline: Mullen Group declares monthly dividend of $0.07 per Common Share, payable to holders of record on December 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Okotoks, Alberta, on December 19, 2024, Mullen Group Ltd. declared a monthly dividend of $0.07 per Common Share (TSX: MTL). The dividend is payable on January 15, 2025, to holders of record of Common Shares as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: FCPT sells leaseback of two Riverview Health properties for $13.5 million. FCPT owns high-quality properties.
news.summary: In Mill Valley, California, a real estate investment trust known as Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT), listed on NYSE as FCPT, specializes in owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties. Recently, the company acquired two Riverview Health outpatient primary care properties for $13.5 million through a sale-leaseback agreement. Riverview Health, a non-profit health system owned by Hamilton County in Indiana, consists of two facilities.

news.headline: Willdan Group releases study on data center growth in Virginia, assessing grid strain & customer impacts. Commissioned by JLARC. #WLDN
news.summary: Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) based in Anaheim, California, recently released a report focusing on the consequences of data center growth in Virginia. The study, conducted for the Virginia Joint Legislative Audit and Review Commission (JLARC), involved examining various load growth scenarios and conducting a cost-of-service analysis. The aim was to assess how the expansion of data centers and the corresponding increase in energy demand would affect the electric grid and impact consumers. The study was carried out by Energy + Environmental Economics (E3), shedding light on the potential grid and customer implications arising from this growth.

news.headline: Aadi Bioscience inks deals worth $200M: $100M sale of FYARRO®, $100M financing for ADC portfolio.
news.summary: Aadi has secured an exclusive license for a three-asset ADC portfolio created in collaboration between WuXi Biologics and HANGZHOU DAC. They have also agreed to sell FYARRO® and its related infrastructure to KAKEN Pharmaceutical for $100 million. Additionally, Aadi has announced a private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing of $100 million in total.

news.headline: Asia leads in crypto adoption with nearly half of top 20 countries; rise of MicroStrategy clones in Asia Express 2024.
news.summary: Can the genuine "MicroStrategy of Asia" emerge? Nearly half of the top 20 nations for crypto adoption are located in Asia, according to Asia Express 2024 reports.

news.headline: House votes on Republican stopgap funding and debt limit bill
TRYNGOLZA approved in U.S. for familial chylomicronemia syndrome, reduces triglycerides, and prevents acute pancreatitis.
news.summary: A new medication called TRYNGOLZA has been found to effectively lower triglycerides and decrease episodes of acute pancreatitis in adults with familial chylomicronemia syndrome (FCS), a rare and severe disease. The treatment is recommended for adults with FCS, regardless of their confirmed genetic or clinical diagnosis. TRYNGOLZA has demonstrated a significant reduction in triglyceride levels and a substantial decrease in the frequency of acute pancreatitis events in patients. This breakthrough medication offers hope for individuals suffering from this debilitating and life-threatening condition.

news.headline: Carlsquare advises Boomi on acquiring Rivery, strategic data integration provider.
news.summary: Carlsquare recently disclosed its exclusive financial advisory position at San Francisco on December 19, 2024. The advice was provided to Boomi, a digital integration and automation leader co-owned by Francisco Partners and TPG. Boomi was advised on its acquisition of Rivery, a renowned data integration provider known for its innovative solutions.

news.headline: Cosmetic Physician Partners and Cosmoplastic Surgery merge for patient-focused care, enhancing operations.
news.summary: In an exciting development, Cosmetic Physician Partners (CPP) and Cosmoplastic Surgery have officially joined forces in Dallas as of December 19, 2024. This collaboration brings together CPP's strong operational proficiency with Cosmoplastic Surgery's renowned personalized patient care services. The partnership seeks to leverage CPP's expertise and Cosmoplastic Surgery's established reputation to mutually benefit from their respective strengths.

news.headline: Japanese Core CPI Nationwide YoY Actual 2.7% (Forecast 2.6%, Previous 2.3%)
Japanese CPI Overall Nationwide Actual 2.9% (Forecast 2.9%, Previous 2.3%)
Dow Jones Futures fail to bounce as yields surge; FedEx and Nike rise after earnings reports.
news.summary: The stock market's attempted recovery following a sell-off on Wednesday was concerning as it ultimately failed. Nvidia experienced a minor increase in its stock value. Nike and FedEx both saw a significant jump in their stock prices after reporting positive earnings late in the day. The Dow Jones Futures were impacted as the market bounce faltered due to a surge in bond yields, with FedEx being a notable gainer.

news.headline: BlackBerry beats Q3 earnings, reports $162M revenue. IoT revenue $62M, cybersecurity $93M, operating cash flow up $34M.
news.summary: Technology company BlackBerry Ltd (NYSE:BB) released their third-quarter financial results recently. They reported a revenue of $162 million, with adjusted earnings of two cents per share, exceeding analyst expectations of a one cent per share loss. The Internet of Things (IoT) revenue saw a 13% increase year-over-year, reaching $62 million, while cybersecurity revenue rose by 7% to $93 million. Licensing revenue stood at $7 million. The total company gross margin for the quarter was 74%. Operating cash flow also saw a significant improvement, increasing by $34 million compared to the previous year. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aura Minerals Inc announces approval of Bluestone acquisition by securityholders at special meeting held on Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: Today in Road Town, British Virgin Islands, Aura Minerals Inc. (TSX: ORA, B3: AURA33) announced that the acquisition of Bluestone Resources Inc. has been approved by Bluestone securityholders. The arrangement, initially disclosed on October 28, 2024, and November 5, 2024, was confirmed at a special meeting. This move signifies a significant step for Aura towards acquiring Bluestone.

news.headline: Interest rates were slashed by 50 basis points, yet mortgage rates rose to 3.79%. House prices remain high.
White House Press Secretary: Statement on GOP Stopgap
Luraco Technologies introduces Luraco Wellness Medical Massage Chairs to combat stress-related diseases with WHO reporting stress accounts for 90% of all illnesses.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Luraco Technologies in Arlington, Texas on December 19, 2024, highlighted their new innovation aimed at addressing the escalating global health crisis linked to stress, which the World Health Organization attributes to 90% of all diseases. The company revealed their latest product, the Luraco Wellness Medical...

news.headline: BlackRock unveils Bitcoin ad, provoking backlash from hodlers due to disclaimer on cryptocurrency's fixed supply.
news.summary: BlackRock, the largest asset manager globally, recently shared a video endorsing Bitcoin. However, holders of the cryptocurrency are expressing discontent over a disclaimer within the video that casts doubt on Bitcoin's fixed supply.

news.headline: Craig Wright avoided a two-year jail term for contempt in court after filing another lawsuit, receiving a warning instead.
news.summary: Despite being found in contempt of court for submitting a new lawsuit, Wright was given a warning by a High Court judge.

news.headline: REACH LA to honor Peppermint, Jessica Betts, and Blair Imani at gala; Peppermint to receive Trans Vanguard Award.
news.summary: Renowned entertainer and advocate Peppermint is set to be presented with the prestigious Trans Vanguard Award by a prominent organization. The talented singer-songwriter Jessica Betts will also be recognized with the Artistic Impact Award, while the well-known social media activist Blair Imani will receive the Activist with Impact Award. The awards ceremony will take place in Los Angeles on December 19, 2024. The event is organized by REACH LA, an organization dedicated to empowering individuals and communities.

news.headline: Ria Money Transfer teams up with Tenpay Global, letting users send money to Weixin Pay for spending in China.
news.summary: Customers can now transfer funds from both online and in-person platforms of Ria to Weixin Pay, a prominent payment and digital wallet service in China.

news.headline: Euro Sun has completed the second tranche of its private placement financing.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous quarter. This decrease represents approximately 350,000 individuals who have found employment during this period. The report also highlights that the economy has added about 400,000 new jobs in various sectors. This positive trend is attributed to the government's initiatives to stimulate economic growth and create more job opportunities. Moreover, the average hourly wage has slightly increased by 2.5%, indicating a modest improvement in the overall economic conditions. Overall, these statistics demonstrate a promising outlook for the labor market and suggest a gradual recovery from the impacts of the recent economic downturn.

news.headline: South Korea's Acting Defense Chief Speaks with US Austin on Phone, Reports Yonhap
Illinois Commerce Commission approves Ameren Illinois' 4-year grid plan to enhance reliability under CEJA.
news.summary: In Collinsville, Illinois, on December 19, 2024, the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) gave the green light to Ameren Illinois' four-year integrated grid plan. This plan is mandated by the Climate and Equitable Jobs Act (CEJA) and aims to ensure grid reliability while also initiating improvements to prepare the electric grid for future needs.

news.headline: Houston-based private equity firm The Sterling Group promotes John Griffin and Claudine Lussier to Partners.
news.summary: In Houston on December 19, 2024, The Sterling Group, a middle market private equity firm, has promoted John Griffin and Claudine Lussier to Partner positions. This move comes as a recognition of their outstanding work within the company. The firm, known for its operational focus, continues to expand its team, with Griffin and Lussier now taking on more prominent roles. This development underscores The Sterling Group's commitment to growth and excellence in their industry.

news.headline: South Korea and US Defense Chiefs Reaffirm Alliance: Yonhap News
White House: Biden's Travel to Italy Addressed in Statement
Biden to Meet with Prime Minister Meloni During Italy Trip
Potandon Produce CEO Mel Davenport retires after 30+ years, replaced by David Lawrence from Fresh Direct.
news.summary: In Idaho Falls, Idaho & Dallas, a prominent provider of fresh potatoes in North America, Potandon Produce, has revealed that its Chief Executive Officer, Mel Davenport, will retire after more than 30 years with the company. Davenport notably oversaw the introduction of Klondike Gold™ potatoes and CarbSmart™ products. Taking over as CEO is David Lawrence, the former CEO of Fresh Direct, starting immediately. Davenport's tenure spans close to three decades, during which Potandon Produce has made significant strides in the industry.

news.headline: Formula 1 signs multi-year deal with Crypto.com, securing sponsorship at events for the next 5 years.
news.summary: Crypto.com has solidified an extended partnership guaranteeing its prominent representation at major Formula 1 events for the next five years.

news.headline: Check out Mark Zuckerberg from Facebook discussing his life, history, and humanity on Bloomberg.
Azamara Cruises to introduce winter 2026-2027 cruises with first European sailings and return to China.
news.summary: Azamara Cruises, a renowned small-ship cruise line known for its Destination Immersion® and Extended Destination Days, has announced its inaugural European winter-season sailings and its return to China. This news comes as the company prepares for the upcoming season, with high anticipation surrounding these developments. The brand's first-ever European winter sailings are set to offer guests a unique experience, while the return to China marks a significant expansion in their global presence. With these exciting updates, Azamara Cruises is poised to provide unforgettable experiences to its passengers, further solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: Forge Institute unveils Phoenix Xcelerator to boost defense tech startups in Little Rock, Ark. to scale growth.
news.summary: In Little Rock, Arkansas on December 19, 2024, Forge Institute unveiled the Phoenix Xcelerator, a cutting-edge initiative aimed at supporting and advancing startups within the defense and aerospace industries. This innovative program offers structured support, including a rigorous high-quality curriculum, to nurture growth and success among emerging companies.

news.headline: VivoPower files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F, meets regulatory requirements.
news.summary: Last month, an increase in unemployment was reported in the United States, with the jobless rate rising to 6.1% in April. This rise in unemployment affected approximately 9.8 million Americans who were actively seeking employment. The leisure and hospitality sector were hit the hardest, with 331,000 jobs lost due to ongoing pandemic-related restrictions. Despite this setback, there was also a notable increase in job openings to 8.1 million. The labor force participation rate slightly decreased to 61.7% as some individuals exited the labor market. These statistics reflect the continuing economic challenges faced by many amidst the pandemic.

news.headline: Vertex stock drops 11% due to non-opioid pain drug performing no better than placebo in patients with lower back and hip pain.
news.summary: Shares of Vertex took a sharp nosedive on Thursday following disappointing results from the company's pain medication trial. The drug, intended for patients suffering from lower back and hip pain, was found to be no more effective than a placebo. This news led to an 11% drop in Vertex's stock value. The outcome was described as a "worst-case scenario" for the pharmaceutical company.
